query: d3 transform NaN and vite outdated optimize dep

results.title: D3.js Graph Explorer Refactor
results.content: Replaced static Canvas graph on minder/src/dashboard with D3.js v7 force-directed renderer. Pattern: D3GraphRenderer class (extends d3.SimulationNodeDatum/SimulationLinkDatum), forceManyBody+forceLink+forceCollide+forceCenter, d3.zoom for pan/zoom, SVG glow filter for selected nodes, drag-to-pin. Tab nav: Graph|Overview|Search|Impact|Settings. Dark canvas (radial-gradient dark navy). Legend overlay, tooltip, zoom controls overlay. Three renderer instances: repoRenderer (eager), searchRenderer/impactRenderer (lazy on first use). bun add d3 @types/d3. CSS classes (tab-btn, tab-btn-active, graph-ctrl-btn) in global.css — NOT Astro scoped style (Tailwind v4 @apply breaks in scoped blocks). Build: astro build passes.

results.title: Quote form guests changed to number input with min 2
results.content: Updated plugins/ski-price-calculator/includes/class-spcu-shortcode.php: replaced quote_guests select with input type=number min=2 step=1 default=2. Added number input styling, JS initialization validation to reset invalid/low values to 2, input+change listeners for live recalculation, and runtime clamp in calculatePrice so guests is always >=2.

results.title: ReactSelect safe optimization and style cleanup
results.content: Optimized src/components/atoms/ReactSelect/ReactSelect.tsx without changing logic: memoized customStyles with useMemo, memoized merged components to avoid recreating LoadingMessage/LoadingIndicator config each render, removed redundant formatOptionLabel prop pass-through (already included in spread props), and kept existing color/size/error behavior intact.

results.title: useSearchParamsState immutable+no-op
results.content: Applied immutable merge and query-equality guard before router.replace in useSearchParamsState.

results.title: Git branch for recaptcha locale patch
results.content: Created branch codex/recaptcha-locale and committed the GoogleRecaptcha locale propagation change as d4c070d4 with message Pass locale into GoogleRecaptcha. Pre-commit ran lint-staged with prettier and eslint --fix successfully before commit.
